title: Terms of Service
body:
⚖️ ChampionsReviews.Com — Terms of Service

📅 Effective Date: October 12, 2025
🌐 Website: www.ChampionsReviews.Com
✉️ Contact: support@championsreviews.com

🏰 1. Introduction

Welcome to ChampionsReviews.Com — your trusted global shopping gateway.
By using this website, you agree to these Terms of Service (“Terms”). If you do not agree, please discontinue using the website.

We are an independent affiliate marketing platform showcasing products from global partners like Amazon, Walmart, Etsy, and eBay.

🛍️ 2. Nature of Our Service

ChampionsReviews.Com does not sell or ship products directly.
We curate and present product information and redirect you to official marketplaces to complete your purchases.

All purchases, returns, or disputes are managed directly by the respective merchants under their own terms and conditions.

💰 3. Affiliate Disclosure

We participate in several affiliate programs, including:

  • 🛒 Amazon Associates (Affiliate ID: skymaxx02-20)
  • 🏬 Walmart Affiliate Network
  • 🧵 Etsy Partner Program
  • 📦 eBay Partner Network

When you purchase through our links, we may earn a small commission — at no extra cost to you.

🧭 4. Use of the Website

You agree to use this website responsibly and lawfully.
Do not attempt to hack, misuse, or copy content without permission.
We reserve the right to restrict or block access for violations or misuse.

📜 5. Intellectual Property Rights

All original text, graphics, and layouts on ChampionsReviews.Com belong to us.
You may share brief excerpts with proper credit and a link to our original content.

All brand names and trademarks (Amazon, Walmart, Etsy, eBay, etc.) belong to their respective owners.

📈 6. Accuracy of Information

We strive to ensure our product data, prices, and ratings are accurate.
However, due to frequent marketplace changes, we cannot guarantee real-time accuracy.
Please verify details directly on the merchant’s website before making a purchase.

🌐 7. Third-Party Links & Content

Our website includes links to third-party platforms such as Amazon, Walmart, eBay, and Etsy.
We are not responsible for their content, policies, or actions.
Visiting those sites is entirely at your own discretion and risk.

⚠️ 8. Limitation of Liability

ChampionsReviews.Com, its owners, or affiliates shall not be liable for:

  • Direct, indirect, or incidental damages.
  • Any loss resulting from use or inability to use the website.
  • Any issues caused by external merchant websites or links.

📢 9. Disclaimer

All content on this site is provided “as is” for informational purposes only.
We make no guarantees about the accuracy, reliability, or performance of any product or merchant featured here.

🔐 10. Privacy Policy

Your use of this website is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect, store, and protect your data.

🕒 11. Modifications to Terms

We may update or modify these Terms at any time, without prior notice.
The most recent version will always appear on this page.
Your continued use of the site means you accept the updated Terms.

⚖️ 12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States of America.
Any disputes will be handled in competent U.S. courts.

📬 13. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or suggestions, please contact us:

  • ✉️ Email: support@championsreviews.com
  • 🌐 Website: www.ChampionsReviews.Com

© 2025 ChampionsReviews.Com — All Rights Reserved.
🔸 Your Global Shopping Gateway 🔸
